name: --angle Characterization
carving_goal: Settle whether --angle is functional or dead code.

categorization.reasoning: No systematic trend across 7 angle values. HIGH rate bounces between 0/3 and 2/3 with no monotone or resonance pattern. The 0/3 results at angle=60 and 120 are within binomial noise at N=3 (p=0.43, P(0/3)=0.19). Basin E values (HIGH E~88-89, LOW E~75-76) are completely angle-independent. Overall 9/21=43% HIGH is consistent with baseline RNG-dominated selection.
categorization.action: RETIRED from parameter space. --angle does not control basin selection or basin position.

pre_registration_evaluation.functional: KILLED — no systematic trend, variation consistent with RNG noise
pre_registration_evaluation.non_functional: CONFIRMED — --angle retired from active parameter space
